title: Manieggs: Revenge of the Hard Egg
original_title: Manieggs - Revenge of the Hard Egg
overview: Two inmates seek revenge on their release from jail after serving a two-week sentence for a crime they did not commit. The film illustrates the extremities of our time and the injustice that surrounds us.
